name: Almost Pecan Pie Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 can Coconut cream (or evaporated milk, if preferred)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Mix the melted butter, flour, and light brown sugar for the crust. Spread evenly in a 9x13-inch pan and bake for 15 minutes. Remove from oven and cool completely.
Lower the oven temperature to 325°F. In a separate bowl, mix the filling ingredients (except powdered sugar) until combined. Spread over the cooled crust.
Bake for 40 minutes or until the mixture is firm. Sprinkle the top with powdered sugar while it is still warm. Cool before cutting into 48 squares. Freezes well.
